title: xploit
description: automated red-teaming suite for ai agents that coordinates adversarial attack agents and visualizes jailbreak attempts in real time

title: okekeclean
description: python package for detecting artifacts in arterial blood pressure and ecg waveforms, with released inference code and downloadable model weights

title: dictator
description: voice typing daemon for linux that records speech, transcribes it with whisper-compatible apis, and types into any focused application

title: rollouts
description: go cli and nixos deployment framework for generating traefik-ready container configs and deploying personal infrastructure with deploy-rs

title: identifying connectomic biomarkers for autism
description: training models to identify biomarkers for autism from connectomes (graph representations of the brain)

title: mlgo: machine learning for predicting GO enrichment
description: autoencoder-based pipeline for reconstructing RNA-seq log fold-change profiles and predicting gene ontology enrichment

title: wazobiacode.com
description: custom learning platform for a web development bootcamp serving Nigerian high school students with progress tracking and Telegram integration

title: diffgpt
description: AI-powered commit message generator that learns from your repository's commit style

title: dump
description: cli tool for packaging local files, urls, and tmux panes into llm-ready markdown or xml context
